scripts.build:wasm: wasm-pack build ../../apps/rescope-wasm --target no-modules --out-dir ../../apps/docs/public/wasm --no-pack && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),f='public/demo-sw.js',c=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8').replace(/const SW_BUILD_TS = \\d+;/,'const SW_BUILD_TS = '+Date.now()+';');fs.writeFileSync(f,c);console.log('[stamp] demo-sw.js stamped')"
